$schema: Profile schema for regions (geographic buckets for geotagging)

properties.id: Region identifier (eu, mena, sahel, gulf_of_mexico, etc.)
properties.name: Full name
properties.type: continent | subregion | economic_zone | climate_zone | maritime | corridor
properties.countries: Array of member country ISO3 codes
properties.bbox: Bounding box [west, south, east, north] for geo queries
properties.hazards: Array of natural hazard types common to region
